front.title: MPEG-2 Transport Stream Packaging for Media Over QUIC Transport

abstract.t: This document extends the MOQT Streaming Format (MSF) by registering the "m2ts" packaging value for carrying MPEG-2 Transport Stream and M2TS source packets over Media Over QUIC Transport. It defines catalog fields for transport-stream track description and specifies receiver and relay behavior for joining, switching, and validating packetized streams.
